Bash(/opt/homebrew/bin/python3.11 -c "
import objc
import ctypes
from Foundation import NSRunLoop, NSDate
objc.loadBundle\('IOBluetooth',
    bundle_path='/System/Library/Frameworks/IOBluetooth.framework',
    module_globals=globals\(\)\)

def run_loop\(sec\):
    NSRunLoop.currentRunLoop\(\).runUntilDate_\(NSDate.dateWithTimeIntervalSinceNow_\(sec\)\)

d = IOBluetoothDevice.deviceWithAddressString_\('74:d5:c6:6c:9a:96'\)
print\('device ok:', d is not None\)
print\('connected:', d.isConnected\(\)\)

# openRFCOMMChannel_channel_ を使う（別のシグネチャ）
# 戻り値だけ確認
try:
    result = d.openRFCOMMChannel_channel_\(6, None\)
    print\('openRFCOMMChannel result:', result\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('error:', e\)
" 2>&1)
